sentence_reviews.text: A scalar energy ranks compatible configurations lower than incompatible ones.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based model discussion: probability models parameterized by an energy function, with lower energy corresponding to more probable/configuration-compatible states.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited source directly supports the low-energy/high-compatibility definition.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, probabilistic generative modeling and energy-based model material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy-based models are a probabilistic/generative modeling formulation, but the 'combined with' wording is an atlas relation.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
